commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a24076d8ffd9f99ac0924fb8147ac4245c6b112f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes diagnostic session-state pruning so any entry older than the existing TTL is deleted even when it is not idle.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can leave non-mutated diagnostic states after failed recovery, and the PR's added branch would delete any stale state regardless of recovery eligibility. I did not run a live gateway reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor revision and real behavior proof before merge; automation should not take over while the proof gate and state-recovery design are unresolved.

target.title: fix(logging): prune non-idle stale diagnostic session entries
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
